title: Zel Johans

{{Quote|You can rely on Rancor. Those Rebel scum didn't even know what hit 'em. They'll be looking forward to facing stormtroopers after this!|Sergeant [[Arbmab/Legends|Arbmab]], Hammer 3:2|<ref name="TAoP">{{WEGCite|story=The Assault on Protazk|book=Imperial Sourcebook|reprint=1}}</ref>}}
'''Zel Johans''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Johans would earn the nickname "'''The Rancor'''" from men who served alongside him. He was a well respected tactician, and played a key role in the development of [[Hovertank/Legends|repulsortanks]] for the army.

Johans would eventually be promoted to the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[High Colonel/Legends|High Colonel]], and served as the [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding officer]] of [[Imperial Hammers Elite Armor Unit/Legends|Imperial Hammers Elite Armor Unit]], nicknamed "Hell's Hammers". Johans had a rivalry with [[General/Legends|General]] [[Maximilian Veers/Legends|Maximilian Veers]], who commanded [[Blizzard Force/Legends|Blizzard Force]]. With this rivalry, Johans envisioned an elite, better [[armored battlegroup]].

Johans would be on [[Brintooin Base|the]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Brintooin]] during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which saw the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. Johans would refuse to claim the title of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]], despite the power he wielded. He would eventually serve underneath [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] and his [[Thrawn campaign|campaign]] to wipe out the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Only once did Johan's division serve him. Thrawn would perish [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|at]] [[Bilbringi system/Legends|Bilbringi]] at the hands of [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] bodyguard [[Rukh/Legends|Rukh]].

==Biography==
===Early life===
Zel Johans was born as a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]. At some point within the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], Johans enlisted within the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]].<ref name="ISB" />

===Assault on Protazk===
{{Quote|Welcome to Spuma Flats. I trust you enjoyed the ride. The Rebel forces are at grid reference 678/446. You all know what you have to do. Good luck and good hunting.|Colonel Zel Johans during the assault on Protazk|<ref name="TAoP" />}}
Johans would later come to service with the [[Imperial Hammers Elite Armor Unit/Legends|Imperial Hammers Elite Armor Unit]], otherwise referred as "Hell Hammers". His unit played a pivotal role in the [[Kwymar Suppressions]], a series of invasions to subjugate [[Star system/Legends|systems]]. He was deployed to [[Assault on Protazk|take]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Protazk]]. Johans first plan was to attack the [[Spuma Flats]], a heavily fortified area by the local resistance. It was Johans who personally led regiment from his [[Hovertank/Legends|repulsortank]]. He had several of his tanks engage [[Laser turret/Legends|laser turrets]] and resistance fighters hidden in the trenches. Meanwhile, [[squad three]] had intercepted a flight group of [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeders]]. Once the first assault was finished, [[Imperial Armored Transport|armored transports]] descended from the sky and deployed [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] to finish the siege.<ref name="ISB" />

===Galactic Civil War===
====Turak IV Campaign====
{{Quote|We're asking a lot from Johans' Hammers, but that's why they're here. Besides, to conquer without risk is to triumph without glory and the glory here will be mine!|Imperial General Maltaz|<ref name="The Battle of Turak IV">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/sourcearchive/news20090512.html|text=The Battle of Turak IV|int=The Battle of Turak IV}}</ref>}}
Eighteen months after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] scored major victories at planets [[Aris V]], and [[Vohai]]. Imperial scouts later found a base on [[Turak IV]] being maintained by Alliance [[Sector commander/Legends|Sector Command]]. Rather than evacuate, [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Tallis]], [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of the [[Parmel sector/Legends|Parmel sector]], had authorize [[General/Legends|General]] [[Maltaz]] to command [[Battle Group Turak]]. Tallis also requested two [[Battalion/Legends|battalions]] of the Hell Hammers for assistance as well. While the Alliance had confidence they would be able to handle Maltz, they did not know that the Hell Hammers would be alongside him.

==Personality and traits==
[[File:ImperialHammersEliteArmorUnit-Journal15.jpg|thumb|220x220px|Johans was able to coordinate both starfighter, and ground forces.]]
Johans was masterful tactician within [[Ground warfare|planetary warfare]], and was a well regarded army officer. Johans believed that the [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transport]], was slow and weak. As such, Johans believed that [[Hovertank/Legends|repulsortanks]] were more versatile. Johans was skilled to coordinated [[Orbital bombardment/Legends|orbital strikes]], and [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] attack runs on the enemy. A gifted [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]], Johans was a the creator of the [[Imperial-class repulsortank|''Imperial''-class repulsortanks]].<ref name="ISB" />

Johans was also a believer within the Empire. Believing it was more equipped, and better than the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. As such, he devoted himself to [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[New Order/Legends|New Order]].<ref name="ISB" />

After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], which saw the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] Palpatine, Johans refused to to claim the title of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]], believing only success would earn the promotion. He also refused to claim the title of [[General/Legends|General]], [[Governor/Legends|Governor]], and [[Moff/Legends|Moff]].<ref name="ISB" />

==Skills and abilities==
A skilled tactician and a talented engineer, Johans wore [[Armor/Legends|battle armor]] in battle. He also wielded a [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifle]]. He also had training with [[Unarmed combat/Legends|unarmed combat]].<ref name="ISB" />
